titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/162

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=467 status=live modified=2021-04-06 15:47:33.039283+00 | translation moa=468 status=live modified=2021-04-06 15:47:22.655047+00

div.p:
Omnibus sancte Matris Ecclesie filiis Tam futuris quam presentibus Patricius de Ridal salutem in Christo . Sciatis me concessisse
et hac carta mea confirmasse hospitali ierosolime vnam bouatam terre in territorio de Wittun . illam scilicet que
iacet inter hord lauue et toccechelis . et inter fossam et harhou . et terram dotis Mathildi corbet quam Galfridus
cocus meus liber homo dedit hospitali prenomintato ierosolime per concessionem et bonam uoluntatem heredum suorum in liberam . et
in puram . et in perpetuam elemosinam . pro animabus antecessorum et successorum suorum . Condicione tali quod Isabella
sponsa Willelmi de Ridal’ . et heredes sui uel cui ipsa assignare uoluerit in feudo et hereditate teneant predictam
terram de prenominata domo et in pace possideant . libere . et quiete a multura . et ab omni alio seruicio . et consu
etudine . et ab omni seculari exaccione . Reddendo annuatim hospitali prenominato . ad festum Sancti Jacobi vnam libram
cumini . Hiis testibus . Domino Willelmo filio Iohannis . Domino Waltero de Ridal’ . Radulfo de Ridal’ . Ada de Wittun et filiis
suis . Ada de Waleuhop . Iohanne filio Ade de chatthou . Roberto de bernardebi . et Roberto filio eius . Alexandro de lillescliue
henrico de herice . Ricardo homine abbatis . et multis aliis .

p.cl: To all sons of Holy Mother Church as well future as present Patrick of Ryedale sends greeting in Christ.

Know me to have granted and by this my charter to have made firm to the hospital of Jerusalem one oxgang of land in the territory of Whitton, that which lies to wit between ‘hord lauue’ and ‘toccechelis’ and between the trench and Harrow and the dower land of Matilda Corbet which Geoffrey my cook as a free man has given to the hospital of Jerusalem by the consent and good will of his heirs in free, and in pure, and in perpetual alms, for the souls of his ancestors and successors, on the condition that Isabel the spouse of William of Ryedale and her heirs or the one to whom she may wish to assign it may in feu and heritage hold the foresaid land of the aforenamed monastic house and have possession in peace, free and quit from multure and from all other service and custom and from all secular exaction, by the yearly rendering one pound of cumin annually to the aforenamed hospital at the feast of Saint James.
